summary: Frontend-only testing of the new 'Driver at Disposal / Chauffeur mis à disposition' SEO page on Zont.cab. Tested main listing page in all 4 languages (EN/FR/RU/HY), vehicle sub-pages, navigation, FAQ collapsibles, SEO meta (canonical/hreflang/JSON-LD), pricing 'On request' placeholders, mobile responsiveness, header dropdown, footer link, invalid-slug fallback and hero Book-Now CTA. All 18 acceptance items pass.

issues: H1 is split at the en-dash with the second half coloured gold. For FR the original title contains accented chars ('Privé') and the split renders cleanly; visually OK. No contrast issues observed (dark bg + white/gold text).

console_warnings_observed: React warning: 'Invalid DOM property `fetchpriority`. Did you mean `fetchPriority`?' — emitted on subpage. Likely from a global preload/image component (NOT introduced by DriverAtDisposal/DisposalVehicle code which doesn't use that attr). Cosmetic only.
Google Maps API legacy warnings (pre-existing on homepage, unrelated).

test_results_detail.main_page_FR_/chauffeur-mis-a-dispositio: PASS — all 4 cards present, H1='Chauffeur Mis a Disposition Paris / Location de Chauffeur Privé a l\'Heure', canonical=https://zont.cab/chauffeur-mis-a-disposition, 5 hreflang links, JSON-LD Service schema present, FAQ-0 present, 0 broken images.
test_results_detail.main_page_EN_/driver-at-disposal: PASS — same checks; H1='Driver at Disposal Paris / Hourly Chauffeur Rental'.
test_results_detail.main_page_RU_/voditel-s-avtomobilem: PASS — Cyrillic H1 'Водитель в Распоряжении Париж / Почасовая Аренда Водителя'.
test_results_detail.main_page_HY_/varorde-tramadrutyamb: PASS — Armenian H1 'Վարորդ Տրամադրությամբ Փարիզում / Ժամային Վարձույթ'.
test_results_detail.subpage_FR_mercedes-classe-v: PASS — URL /chauffeur-mis-a-disposition/mercedes-classe-v, hero H1='Mercedes Classe V — Van de luxe 7 places avec chauffeur a Paris', pricing 4h/8h/12h all show 'Sur demande', vehicle-faq-0 collapsible opens on click, back link returns to main page, 3 related-vehicle-* links present, JSON-LD with Service+Product, canonical correct.
test_results_detail.header_dropdown_link: PASS — clicking nav-services-dropdown opens menu; nav-driver-at-disposal href=/chauffeur-mis-a-disposition (FR active), navigates correctly.
test_results_detail.mobile_390x844: PASS — all 4 cards stack vertically (each x=16, width=358), subpage hero renders correctly.
test_results_detail.images: PASS — 4 webp files in /images/, sizes 136-177 KB (all < 200KB), filenames SEO-friendly (mercedes-classe-X-chauffeur-prive-paris.webp, renault-trafic-minibus-chauffeur-paris.webp), alt text includes vehicle name + 'chauffeur prive Paris'.

action_items: Optional: Track down the source of the 'fetchpriority' React DOM warning (lowercase attribute) — likely in a global Image/SEO component; not blocking. Use fetchPriority (camelCase) in JSX.
critical_code_review_comments: disposalData.js is large (~430 lines) but acceptable for SEO content; could be split per-language if it grows further.

VEHICLE_COPY only defines Armenian (hy) entries for FAQ on main UI but not under each vehicle's VEHICLE_COPY (no hy block for per-vehicle copy). If DisposalVehicle.js falls back to en/fr when hy is missing — verify graceful fallback. Not in scope of the test but worth confirming for Armenian visitors landing on /varorde-tramadrutyamb/mercedes-s-class etc.

Hero pageTitle is split on '—' to colour the second half gold; in 'fr' the en-dash is present so it works, but if user edits copy in future without the dash, the second line will be empty. Consider rendering a dedicated subtitle field instead of string-splitting.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Driver-at-Disposal SEO feature fully validated across 4 languages on preview URL. All data-testids present and working. Pricing placeholders ('On request' / 'Sur demande' / 'По запросу' / 'Ըստ պահանջի') intentional. If pricing values are later added, re-run subpage tests to confirm 'From X€' rendering. Armenian per-vehicle long-form copy was not added to VEHICLE_COPY in disposalData.js (only hy UI strings exist) — verify fallback behaviour for /varorde-tramadrutyamb/mercedes-s-class etc.
